title: iliamna rivularis
intro: Iliamna rivularis, also known as the giant mountain hollyhock or false hollyhock, is a flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing compounds like flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Iliamna rivularis has been used to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, providing relief from conditions such as fever, colds, and skin irritations. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
